description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🔄 Content Updated (Published: July 1, 2026)

AI Summary (Please check the original articles for accurate information)

This is a list of Hanno City press release materials for fiscal year 2026 (Reiwa 8).

【July 1, 2026】Hanno City will establish guidelines for its Free-Theme Private Sector Proposal System and launch a public recruitment process for private sector proposals related to comprehensive facility management operations.

【June 22, 2026】The investigation report (public version) concerning a serious bullying incident has been released.

【June 3, 2026】A sounding-type market survey will be conducted regarding the use of the former Mukohara Housing Complex site.

【April 30, 2026】Hanno City staff will implement year-round no-necktie dress codes.

【April 24, 2026】Hanno City will receive a donation from the Ome Shinkin Bank.

【April 22, 2026】The Arima Area Water Source Forest Conservation Project ("Eagle Owl and Japanese Dormouse Forest Project") has been launched.

【April 20, 2026】A donation presentation ceremony will be held for a contribution from the Hanno Rotary Club to Hanno City.

【April 6, 2026】MX Mobile Inc. will make a donation to Hanno City through the corporate hometown tax system.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/hishokohoka/hisho/hodohappyo/houdouhappyou2025_1/13388.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City Press Release Materials – Fiscal Year 2026
